findings.issue: Site-wide spelling drift between 'AI Native' (proper-noun labels), 'AI-native' (body copy), and 'AI-Native' (mega-menu). Within this page the three forms are correctly differentiated (label, body, menu category) but the convention is not documented.
findings.fix: Add a one-line entry to tone-of-voice §7 Vocabulary: body copy uses 'AI-native', mega-menu category uses 'AI-Native', preserved proper-noun labels (e.g. existing 'AI Native Ways of Working' tab) stay as-is.

strengths: Source traceability holds at 100% — every number on the page (65%, 73%, 7989, 73%, 162/156/55/56, 570/424/268/221/88/80/52/43, 300/192/71/53/32/6) verifies exactly against the two source spreadsheets.

Eyebrow citations are inline and named on every section; no redundant Sources block.
Mobile (375px) renders correctly; console clean; all six Fynd-tool links resolve 200.
Spec §6 Decisions now records D5 tab-local numbering so future audits accept the dual §01 sequence.
